description: DreamCLI v0.2 — Resolution chain (env/config/default), required handling, non-interactive behavior rules

tasks.title: Env variable resolution in the resolver
tasks.description: Extend resolve() to accept ResolveOptions with an env record. For each flag with schema.envVar set, look up the value in env after CLI and before default. Coerce env string to the flag's kind (number, boolean, enum validation). Emit ValidationError for invalid env values. Thread env through testkit RunOptions and CLI builder.

tasks.title: Config object resolution in the resolver
tasks.description: Extend ResolveOptions with an optional config record. For each flag with schema.configPath set, resolve dotted path (e.g. 'deploy.region') against the config object after env and before default. Coerce config values same as env. Config object is plain JSON — file loading deferred to a later task or user-land.

tasks.title: Help text shows env/config resolution sources
tasks.description: Update formatHelp to display env var and config path annotations on flags that declare them. e.g. '--region <us|eu|ap>  [env: DEPLOY_REGION] [config: deploy.region]'. Shows users where values can come from.

tasks.title: Non-interactive required handling with actionable hints
tasks.description: When a required flag is missing after full resolution (CLI/env/config/default), the ValidationError suggest field should list all configured sources the user could have used. e.g. 'Provide --region, set DEPLOY_REGION, or add deploy.region to config'. CI-friendly error messages.

tasks.title: Wire env/config through testkit and CLI builder execution paths
tasks.description: Update runCommand() to pass RunOptions.env and RunOptions.config into resolve(). Update CLIBuilder.execute() and .run() to thread adapter.env and optional config through the resolution chain. Ensure all existing tests still pass with the new signatures.
